addTopBarIcon: Add a top bar icon by plugin
getTab: Print out all opened custom tabs in the debugger
confirmRemove: Confirm to delete the data in ${name}?
initWithVSCE: Plugin VSCE loaded, work with theme VSCE
initWithoutVSCE: Plugin VSCE loaded, stop running without using theme VSCE
addTableMinWidth: Minimize the width of table column
